name: @stysys/design-system
description: Comprehensive design system utilities: colors, typography, UI components, brand system, and design tokens

scripts.build: tsc && node fix-imports.cjs && npm run copy:styles && npm run copy:assets && npm run copy:types
scripts.copy:styles: mkdir -p dist/styles/components && cp src/styles/*.css dist/styles/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r src/styles/components/*.css dist/styles/components/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.copy:assets: mkdir -p dist/fonts && cp -r src/fonts/* dist/fonts/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.copy:types: mkdir -p dist/types && cp -r src/types/* dist/types/ 2>/dev/null || true

author: Stysys
